name: Delicate Gold Chain Necklace
description: A beautiful delicate gold chain necklace crafted from premium 925 stainless steel. Perfect for everyday wear or special occasions. Hypoallergenic and tarnish-proof, it maintains its shine for years.

name: Pearl Drop Earrings
description: Timeless pearl drop earrings set in polished 925 stainless steel. These sophisticated earrings add a touch of elegance to any outfit, from casual to formal.
short_desc: Classic pearl drops with polished steel setting

name: Crystal Tennis Bracelet
description: Stunning crystal tennis bracelet featuring round-cut cubic zirconia stones set in premium 925 stainless steel. Water-resistant and built to last.
short_desc: Sparkling CZ stones in a classic tennis style

name: Solitaire Ring
description: Elegant solitaire ring featuring a brilliant round cubic zirconia centerpiece in a classic prong setting. Crafted in 925 stainless steel for lasting beauty.
short_desc: Single CZ stone in a timeless prong setting

name: Layered Pendant Necklace Set
description: Complete 3-piece matching jewelry set including layered necklace, stud earrings, and delicate bracelet. A perfect gift for any occasion.

name: Twist Hoop Earrings
description: Modern twisted hoop earrings crafted from polished 925 stainless steel. Lightweight and comfortable for all-day wear. A wardrobe staple.
short_desc: Modern twisted hoops in polished steel

name: Charm Chain Bracelet
description: Delicate charm bracelet with custom pendants on a fine 925 stainless steel chain. Adjustable length fits all wrist sizes. Hypoallergenic and tarnish-proof.

name: Stackable Band Rings Set
description: Set of 3 stackable band rings in different finishes — gold, silver, and rose gold. Mix and match for a personalized look. 925 stainless steel, hypoallergenic.
short_desc: 3 stackable bands in gold, silver & rose gold
